title: Implement dashboard, issue queue and issue detail UI
requirements: Add memory review dashboard with issue and index counters.
Add issue queue with filters for status, severity, issue kind, source/domain, assignment and privacy/blocker flags.
Add issue detail page with safe metadata, linked source object, linked search document, review history and action forms.
Use existing portal layout and restrained operator UI.
Do not show full extracted text, raw secrets, raw PII or raw query.
Use POST with CSRF for all state-changing actions.
